tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
aa-status
bash: aa-status: command not found

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"if command -v aa-status >/dev/null 2>&1; then aa-status; elif command -v sestatus >/dev/null 2>&1; then sestatus; else echo \"No AppArmor/SELinux, applying mitigations\"; for bin in $(which hping3 2>/dev/null || true) $(which ping 2>/dev/null || true) $(which curl 2>/dev/null || true); do [ -n \"$bin\" ] && chmod a-x \"$bin\" && echo \"chmod a-x $bin\"; done; iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP && echo \"iptables rule added\"; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n | sed -n '1,200p'; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
if command -v aa-status >/dev/null 2>&1; then aaa-status; elif command -v sestatus >/dev/null 2>&1; then sestatus; else echo "Noo AppArmor/SELinux, applying mitigations"; for bin in $(which hping3 2>/dev/null  || true) $(which ping 2>/dev/null || true) $(which curl 2>/dev/null || true); doo [ -n "$bin" ] && chmod a-x "$bin" && echo "chmod a-x $bin"; done; iptables -I OOUTPUT -p icmp -j DROP && echo "iptables rule added"; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n |  sed -n '1,200p'; fi
No AppArmor/SELinux, applying mitigations
chmod a-x /usr/sbin/hping3
chmod a-x /usr/bin/ping
chmod a-x /usr/bin/curl
iptables rule added
